overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing a character navigating rainy Night City streets at night, passing through an underpass and exploring dense urban corridors with neon lighting and atmospheric haze. The camera follows a character in a blue shirt through wet streets, tunnels, and narrow alleyways surrounded by towering industrial buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy street corner with neon signs approaching underpass

events.description: passes extremely close to pedestrian with black umbrella and white hat
approaching entrance to covered concrete underpass

agents.ego_description: turning right from street corner onto sidewalk heading toward the underpass

notable_agents.action: pedestrian carrying black umbrella walking past camera on the left

entered.detail: tall buildings with glowing red neon signage against the night sky
rain-slicked asphalt reflecting street lights with crosswalk markings
tall pole with bright overhead light illuminating the area
elevated highway underpass with dark tunnel entrance ahead
metal fence running along the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a rainy cyberpunk street corner with neon-lit buildings in the distance. The camera turns right onto a wet sidewalk, passing very close to a pedestrian with a black umbrella, and approaches the dark entrance of a concrete underpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete underpass tunnel with graffiti walls

events.description: enters covered underpass with fluorescent lighting
exiting tunnel back into open air

agents.ego_description: walking through the underpass tunnel following a character in a blue shirt ahead

notable_agents.action: character in blue shirt walking ahead through the tunnel toward the exit

entered.detail: gray concrete walls with large graffiti murals including an american flag design
overhead fluorescent light strips illuminating the passage
concrete ceiling of the underpass structure

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a narrow concrete underpass with artificial fluorescent lighting and graffiti-covered walls. Following a character in a blue shirt, the scene transitions from the neon-lit exterior to the enclosed tunnel environment before approaching the exit at the far end.

events.description: exits tunnel into open intersection with parked cars
character ahead transitions from walking to running across the intersection

agents.ego_description: exiting the underpass and crossing the open intersection while following the running character ahead

notable_agents.action: character in blue shirt running ahead across the wet intersection toward narrow streets

entered.detail: wide open paved area with crosswalk markings and scattered debris
futuristic vehicles with glowing accents parked along the curb
dense multi-story buildings with external staircases and lit windows

segments.scene_description: Exiting the tunnel into a wide open intersection, the scene reveals parked cyberpunk vehicles and industrial apartment buildings. The character ahead breaks into a run across the rain-slicked asphalt, with the camera following toward the narrow streets beyond.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow cyberpunk street with dense overhead wires

events.description: camera tilts upward to view the towering building facades and overhead wires

agents.ego_description: walking down narrow urban streets surrounded by towering industrial buildings, eventually panning up to examine the architecture

entered.detail: dense web of electrical wires and cables crisscrossing between buildings
dark multi-story structures with external fire escapes and glowing windows
metal staircases and platforms attached to building facades
tall skyscrapers with red aviation warning lights visible through the haze

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves through narrow cyberpunk streets enclosed by towering industrial buildings with external fire escapes and dense overhead power lines. The camera pans upward to reveal the imposing architecture and distant neon-lit towers shrouded in atmospheric haze, creating a claustrophobic urban canyon effect.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rainy neon street corner through a claustrophobic underpass and into a towering industrial urban canyon. It begins on a wet sidewalk, passing a pedestrian with a black umbrella before turning right toward the dark entrance of a concrete underpass. As the camera enters the tunnel, the vibrant neon exterior gives way to artificial fluorescent lighting and graffiti-covered walls while following a character in a blue shirt. The scene then opens into a wide intersection filled with parked cyberpunk vehicles and industrial apartments, where the character breaks into a run across the rain-slicked asphalt. Finally, the camera moves into narrow streets enclosed by towering buildings and overhead power lines, panning upward to reveal imposing architecture and distant neon towers shrouded in atmospheric haze.
